concerns.detail: Contains profanity and unsupported personal insults including 'sb' (vulgar insult), '走狗' (lackey), and 'b人' (derogatory slang) directed at students and the advisor
concerns.excerpt: 其著名狗腿学生也是个sb

concerns.detail: Identifies a specific postdoc by surname 'Bai' in the context of sensitive personal allegations (pool party incident), which combined with lab context could de-anonymize the private individual
